title: lithocarpus ferrugineus
intro: Lithocarpus ferrugineus, also known as the California nutmeg or tanbark oak, is a deciduous tree native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its tannins and flavonoids content. The health benefits of Lithocarpus ferrugineus include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antitumor activity. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus ferrugineus are typically made by infusing its bark in hot water, and it can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
